creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Is this still an issue with version 3.10.0 now in the tree?


I do have 3.10.1 installed (patch sent in bug #274893)

I have performed a quick test right now by simply shutting down the webserver.

I am seeing no high load, it detected the server is down and changed icon to a grey one.

Looks like it is periodically pinging the server.

Once I restarted the server it went back online in a few seconds (but maybe I was lucky and can take a few minutes I have not checked).

Could you also test this?
